mapper.select: select q.*,p.check_item_name as checkItemName from JKERP.test_report_qualifcation q left join JKERP.test_product_item p on p.check_item_id=q.check_item_id ${ew.customSqlsegment}
mapper.insert:
insert into JKERP.test_report_qualifcation(check_item_id, check_basis_code, count_type, specs_content, condition_key, condition_value, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.checkItemId}, #{entity.checkBasisCode}, #{entity.countType}, #{entity.specsContent}, #{entity.conditionKey}, #{entity.conditionValue}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into JKERP.test_report_qualifcation(check_item_id, check_basis_code, count_type, specs_content, condition_key, condition_value, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.checkItemId}, #{entity.checkBasisCode}, #{entity.countType}, #{entity.specsContent}, #{entity.conditionKey}, #{entity.conditionValue}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update check_item_id = values(check_item_id) , check_basis_code = values(check_basis_code) , count_type = values(count_type) , specs_content = values(specs_content) , condition_key = values(condition_key) , condition_value = values(condition_value) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , remark = values(remark)
